principles: No Light Mode: The mobile experience is exclusively Dark Mode for premium impact.
Cinematic Continuity: No abrupt background color changes between sections.
Glass over Solid: Use glassmorphism for overlays (Nav, Badges) instead of solid blocks.
Content is King: Reduce UI chrome, let the imagery and video breathe.

hierarchy.display_hero: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
hierarchy.section_heading: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-serif font-light tracking-wide text-white
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#C9A962]

grid_system.scroll_snap: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-4 pb-8 no-scrollbar

fixes: Ensure video poster/fallback is a high-res dark interior image, never black.
Remove 'We serve...' text from hero to reduce clutter.
Gradient overlay must be 'from-black via-black/40 to-transparent' to make text pop.

Trust Badges.styles: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-20 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-white/10 py-4
Trust Badges.content: Monochrome logos (opacity-50) + minimalist stats (text-xs uppercase). Single row, scrolling if needed.

Solutions Section.card_style: aspect-[4/5] relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden group border border-white/5
Solutions Section.typography: Title at bottom-left, overlaid on image gradient. No 'Read More' buttons - entire card is clickable.

Planning Tools (The Purple Fix).smart_builder_card: col-span-full aspect-video rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden border border-[#C9A962]/20 group
Planning Tools (The Purple Fix).background: Use a dark architectural wireframe video or image. NO PURPLE GRADIENTS.
Planning Tools (The Purple Fix).text: Gold accent for 'AI Powered', White for main title.

Stats Section.number_style: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-serif text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-[#C9A962] to-[#8a7035]

Navigation (Mobile).tab_bar: fixed bottom-4 left-4 right-4 h-16 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-full border border-white/10 shadow-2xl z-50 flex items-center justify-around px-2
Navigation (Mobile).fab_integration: The central item of the tab bar should be the 'Quick Actions' trigger (Gold Icon).
Navigation (Mobile).aura_avatar: Move AURA avatar to inside the 'Quick Actions' menu or make it a subtle animated icon in the top-right header.

hero.search_query: luxury dark interior penthouse night dubai
hero.alt: Dark luxury penthouse interior in Dubai

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: Apply 'dark' class to the html tag or wrap the main provider.
REMOVE WHITE BACKGROUNDS: Grep for 'bg-white', 'bg-gray-50', 'bg-slate-50' and replace with 'bg-[#050505]' or 'bg-transparent'.
GOLD ACCENTS ONLY: Use #C9A962 for primary actions/highlights. Avoid green/blue/purple unless functionally critical (e.g. success states).
REDUCE PADDING: On mobile, use p-4 or p-5. Avoid p-12 or p-16 which wastes screen real estate.
SNAP SCROLLING: For all horizontal lists (Tools, Projects), use 'snap-x snap-mandatory' for a native app feel.
DATA-TESTID: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
